name: @gana-v8/hermes-recovery
description: Recovery and redrive runtime for Hermes automation cycles.

scripts.test: pnpm run build && node --input-type=module --eval "import('./dist/src/index.js').then((module) => { if (module.workspaceInfo?.packageName !== '@gana-v8/hermes-recovery') throw new Error('workspaceInfo.packageName mismatch'); console.log('test ok: @gana-v8/hermes-recovery'); })"
scripts.clean: node --eval "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
